raw_samples.evidence: page-level dark surface + Toss Product Sans confirmed

raw_samples.label: primary-button-chrome
raw_samples.evidence: ghost button on dark — fill via translucent off-white tint, not solid colour

raw_samples.label: memo-chip
raw_samples.evidence: pill-style chip — second radius tier (32px) for contextual actions

raw_samples.label: nav-link
raw_samples.evidence: global nav weight 500 (between body 400 and heading 700)

raw_samples.label: input
raw_samples.evidence: text input fully white on dark — no placeholder seen in this sample

raw_samples.label: css-token-positive-red-fill
raw_samples.evidence: KR-finance convention: 'positive' (up / 매수) renders red — semantic token captured directly from :root

raw_samples.label: css-token-negative-blue-fill
raw_samples.evidence: KR-finance convention: 'negative' (down / 매도) renders blue — same hex as Toss Blue brand CTA, context disambiguates

raw_samples.label: css-token-brand-blue
raw_samples.evidence: Brand fill = Toss Blue — inherited from parent toss.im design language

raw_samples.label: css-token-page-surface
raw_samples.evidence: dark-mode page surface — deeper than rendered body (which observes 23,23,28 via composite)

raw_samples.label: css-token-panel-border-outer
raw_samples.evidence: panel separation via translucent border, not box-shadow — confirms zero-elevation chrome thesis

tier1_ds_status: negative — no public design.tossinvest.com / brand portal / Storybook / Figma library; production code exposes 416 :root tokens (--tw-semantic-* + --tw-adaptive-* + --wts-adaptive-*) which is the closest public artifact
